comment: Optional overlay for tracker handoff retries, idempotency, and retryable HTTP codes. Copy to a private path or inject via secret ONCALL_TRACKER_HANDOFF_POLICY_JSON (overrides repo var ONCALL_TRACKER_HANDOFF_POLICY_PATH). validate_oncall_tracker_handoff.py emits governance_audit.policy_resolution, policy_drift_vs_builtin_defaults vs built-in clamps, and per-row response.reconciliation (redacted) in oncall-tracker-handoff-results.json. CI uses this example for deterministic contract checks.
